content:
🚀 TREK | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide individuals and groups with a comprehensive, self-hosted platform for planning and managing all aspects of their trips, from initial itinerary creation to budgeting and packing.
✨ Key Features: • Self-hosted • Real-time collaboration • Interactive maps (Leaflet/Mapbox GL) • Budget tracker • Packing lists
📖 Summary: TREK is a self-hosted, real-time collaborative travel planner application. It offers features like interactive maps, budget tracking, packing lists, and a journal, all accessible via a Progressive Web App (PWA) with support for Single Sign-On (SSO).
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
